title: Family
aiDetails: Family tasks are important and urgent.

title: Complete project documentation
description: Write comprehensive documentation for the new feature
aiDetails:
Based on the project requirements, you should focus on:

1. API documentation with examples
2. User guide with screenshots
3. Technical architecture overview
4. Deployment instructions

This will help the team understand the implementation better.

title: Review code changes
description: Review pull request #123 for the authentication module
aiDetails:
The code changes look good. Consider:

- Adding unit tests for edge cases
- Improving error handling
- Adding logging for debugging

The authentication flow is secure and follows best practices.
